title: pyrethrum nivale
intro: Pyrethrum nivale is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. It is also known as Himalayan fleabane or alpine daisy, and its flowers are a rich source of pyrethrin, a natural insecticide. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum nivale include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health benefits including skin conditions, fever, and respiratory issues.
